# GrooveLinx — Session Summary Enhancement + Polish

_Generated by Claude · 2026-03-24_

## Summary Screen Enhancements

### Quick Rating
Three-button rating selector:
- **Great** (fire icon, green)
- **Solid** (muscle icon, indigo)
- **Needs Work** (wrench icon, amber)

Selected button scales up with tinted background. Rating saved to session.

### Auto-Generated Summary
`_rmGenerateAutoSummary()` produces a human-readable summary based on:
- Song count + duration
- Pacing verdict (on target / over / under)
- Specific songs that ran over

Examples:
- "5 songs, 47 min. Great pacing — right on target."
- "8 songs, 62 min. Ran 12 min over — consider tighter transitions. 'Scarlet Begonias' needed extra time."

Saved to `session.summary` — shown on session cards.

### Completion Moment
- Animated card entrance (scale + fade)
- Checkmark with bounce animation
- Full date display ("Monday, March 24")
- Save button flashes green + shows "Saved!" for 800ms before closing
- Mixdown attachment collapsed by default (less clutter)

### Drive Link Detection
When a Drive URL is pasted:
- Detects `drive.google.com` / `docs.google.com`
- Shows "Google Drive link detected" confirmation
- Non-Drive URLs show "Direct audio link"

## Session Card Improvements

### Rating Indicator
Fire/Muscle/Wrench icon next to the verdict on each card.

### Summary Line
Auto-generated or saved summary shown below the header. If present, replaces the raw song list (cleaner).

### Inline Mixdown Player
"Mixdown" button toggles an inline `<audio>` player directly in the card. No need to open Chopper for quick playback. Chopper remains available as a separate "Chopper" button for deep analysis.

### Card Layout
```
[Date]  [Duration]  [Verdict]  [Rating]  [Mixdown]  [Songs/Total]
[Summary line — auto-generated, human-readable]
[Notes preview]
[LATEST] [Details] [Mixdown ▶] [Chopper ✂️] [Delete 🗑️]
  └─ Block timing breakdown (expandable)
  └─ Inline audio player (expandable, if mixdown attached)
```

## Files Changed

| File | What |
|------|------|
| `rehearsal-mode.js` | Rewrote summary screen: rating, auto-summary, animations, Drive detection, save flash |
| `js/features/rehearsal.js` | Session cards: rating badge, summary line, inline mixdown player, split Mixdown/Chopper buttons |

## New Session Fields

| Field | Type | Source |
|-------|------|--------|
| rating | 'great' / 'solid' / 'needs_work' | User selection in summary |
| summary | string | Auto-generated from duration/songs/pacing |

## Smoke Tests

| Test | Expected |
|------|----------|
| End rehearsal | Summary overlay with animated entrance |
| Rating buttons | Selected button highlights, others dim |
| Auto-summary | Shows readable pacing summary |
| Save session | Button flashes "Saved!", overlay closes after 800ms |
| Skip | Overlay closes, session still saved (no notes/rating) |
| Paste Drive URL | Shows "Google Drive link detected" |
| Upload MP3 | File name + size shown |
| Session card rating | Shows fire/muscle/wrench icon |
| Session card summary | Shows auto-generated summary line |
| Inline mixdown | "Mixdown" button toggles audio player in card |
| Chopper button | Separate button opens Chopper with audio |
| No mixdown | No Mixdown/Chopper buttons shown |
